The Interaction Atlas

Every state a child can reach while answering a question, played on the real product. Scan top to bottom. Each card shows one moment; the coloured tag says whether it is working as intended.

As ruled working the way it should Worth a look maybe fine, your call A problem either on hold or just found

Two problems to look for: the Try again card in Group A still shows the old message (a fix is on hold), and the last group has 3 newly-found problems where a right answer is accepted but the box is coloured red. These need your decision.

Captured on a phone-sized screen. The little mascot that normally sits in the corner is hidden so each state is clear.

Group A — Answering a question

Group B — Getting help

Group C — The kinds of question (each shown getting it wrong)

Group D — When the right answer is written a different way

Interaction Atlas — built from the real question engine. Nothing here is a mock-up.
